name: Burrow & Associates, LLC - Duluth, GA
description_short: Atlanta-based law firm specializing in bankruptcy and personal injury cases with a Duluth, GA office. Offers free consultations and has served the community for over 25 years.
description_long:
Burrow & Associates is a law firm established in 1996 that operates multiple offices across Georgia, including a dedicated Duluth location at 2280 Satellite Blvd. The firm has built its reputation over 25+ years serving residents of the Atlanta metro area and surrounding communities with legal representation in two primary practice areas.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services to help clients navigate financial difficulties, including guidance on filing for bankruptcy, understanding options, and exploring solutions tailored to individual circumstances. They also maintain a substantial personal injury practice handling cases involving car accidents, motorcycle accidents, dog bites, slips and falls, and wrongful injury claims. Both practice areas include free initial consultations to assess client situations.

The Duluth office is staffed by named attorneys including Darrell L Burrow, Michael Burrow, Brien Nelson, Adam Long, and Joshua Samuels. The firm maintains extended hours including Saturday morning appointments (9AM-1PM) and offers live chat consultation options. They service a wide geographic area spanning multiple Georgia cities and regions.

While the firm shows strong client satisfaction through consistently high online reviews (all 5-star testimonials highlight professionalism, competence, and timely service), this profile is limited to information provided on their website. Potential bankruptcy clients should independently verify attorney credentials, experience with specific bankruptcy chapters, fee structures, and comparative services before engaging representation.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 25+ years of established history serving the Duluth and Atlanta community since 1996
Extended office hours including Saturday mornings (9AM-1PM) for client accessibility
Free initial consultations available to assess bankruptcy and personal injury cases
Multiple named attorneys listed with firm experience and specialization
Strong online client reviews emphasizing professionalism, knowledge, and timely handling
Multiple office locations (Duluth, Athens, Conyers) providing geographic flexibility
Live chat and phone consultation options available alongside in-person meetings
cons: Website does not specify bankruptcy chapter expertise (Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 focus) or fee structure details
No information provided about bankruptcy filing success rates or specific outcomes
Personal injury focus appears equally prominent to bankruptcy, potentially dividing firm resources
Website lacks detail on individual attorney credentials, bar certifications, or bankruptcy specialization
No information about alternatives offered to bankruptcy filing or credit counseling services
best_for: Individuals seeking bankruptcy representation in the Duluth or greater Atlanta area who prefer established firms with 25+ year histories
Personal injury victims (car/motorcycle accidents, dog bites) who also need bankruptcy guidance
Georgia residents needing flexible consultation hours including weekend availability
diagnosis: Burrow & Associates is best for Georgia residents seeking bankruptcy representation from an established firm with 25+ years of community presence and accessible scheduling. The main caveat is that the website lacks specific information about fee structures, bankruptcy chapter specialization, success rates, and individual attorney credentials—all critical factors for bankruptcy decisions that warrant direct inquiry before engagement.
services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy (inferred from website mention of bankruptcy types)
Chapter 13 bankruptcy (inferred from website mention of bankruptcy types)
Personal injury case representation for car accidents
Document preparation and legal filing services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
